title: German Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty, smoky skillet dish featuring robust german sausage, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil and swirl to coat the bottom of the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the German sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Sprinkle with caraway seeds, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
